metadata.scope: Natural gas transmission pipelines operated by OGE and gas-relevant OGE participation routes, using public geometry sources only.
limitations: Public OGE sources document routes, projects, lengths and ownership, but do not provide an official downloadable GIS line dataset.
Exact completeness and geometry accuracy require reconciliation with internal OGE GIS, BIL or asset data.
Known routes without public GIS geometry are documented in completeness_audit.
Non-pipeline gas assets, for example bioplus LNG, are excluded from route geometry and documented in completeness_audit where relevant.
Unclassified OGE direct and joint-operator segments from the SciGRID base data are grouped as oge_direct_unclassified or joint_operator_unclassified when no named route group is available.

source_catalog.name: OGE public web pages and annual reports

completeness_audit.operator_owner_note: OGE / NaTran Deutschland; older raw data may still contain GRTgaz naming.

completeness_audit.commissioning_public_note: Annual Report 2025 says April 2025; OGE project and press pages describe July 2025 commissioning/completion.
completeness_audit.official_basis: OGE TENP III project page; OGE TENP III press release; OGE Annual Report 2025
OGE NETG project page; OGE NETG press release 2023
OGE Beteiligungen; OGE ZEELINK project page

completeness_audit.status_public: WAL I in operation since 2022; WAL II completed 2023
completeness_audit.official_basis: OGE WAL I/II project page; OGE WAL II press release

completeness_audit.commissioning_public_note: OGE project page states planned commissioning in Q4/December 2025; Annual Report 2025 states completion in November 2025.
completeness_audit.official_basis: OGE EWA project page; OGE Annual Report 2025
OGE MaHeiDo project page; OGE Annual Report 2025
OGE MaHeiDo project page; OGE Annual Report 2025

completeness_audit.scope_note: CH4 project attributes are from the OGE WKL CH4 project page. Annual Report 2025 WKL values of 11 km and DN 1000 refer to the H2/core-network context and are not used for CH4 attributes.
OGE Annual Report 2025 lists NEL Beteiligungs GmbH, but public NEL pipeline ownership sources list NEL Gastransport/Gasunie/Fluxys structures rather than OGE as pipeline co-owner.
completeness_audit.official_basis: OGE Annual Report 2025; Fluxys NEL/EUGAL/OAL public ownership information

completeness_audit.scope_note: Gas-relevant OGE participation, but not a pipeline route. Excluded from route geometry while documented for scope clarity.

excluded_or_not_oge_confirmed.name: NEL
excluded_or_not_oge_confirmed.reason: Public pipeline ownership not confirmed as OGE route; only NEL Beteiligungs GmbH appears in OGE Annual Report 2025.

excluded_or_not_oge_confirmed.name: EUGAL
excluded_or_not_oge_confirmed.reason: Publicly associated with other transmission-system ownership structures; not listed by OGE as OGE Leitungsgesellschaft.

excluded_or_not_oge_confirmed.name: OAL
excluded_or_not_oge_confirmed.reason: Publicly associated with other transmission-system ownership structures; not listed by OGE as OGE Leitungsgesellschaft.

excluded_or_not_oge_confirmed.name: OPAL
excluded_or_not_oge_confirmed.reason: Not listed by OGE as OGE Leitungsgesellschaft in current public OGE Beteiligungen scope.
